title: betaSandwich: Robust Confidence Intervals for Standardized Regression Coefficients
text: Generates robust confidence intervals standardized regression coefficients using heteroskedasticity-consistent standard errors models fitted lm() described Dudgeon (2017: http://doi.org/10.1007/s11336-017-9563-z).

title: Robust Confidence Intervals for Standardized Regression Coefficients
text: example, multiple regression model fitted using program quality ratings (QUALITY) regressand/outcome variable number published articles attributed program faculty members (NARTIC), percent faculty members holding research grants (PCTGRT), percentage program graduates received support (PCTSUPP) regressor/predictor variables using data set 1982 ratings 46 doctoral programs psychology USA (National Research Council, 1982). Robust confidence intervals standardized regression coefficients generated using BetaHC() function betaSandwich package following Dudgeon (2017).

title: Standardized Regression Slopes — coef.betasandwich
text: Standardized Regression Slopes

title: Standardized Regression Slopes — coef.betasandwich
Standardized Regression Slopes — coef.betasandwich
text: object Object class betasandwich. ... additional arguments.

title: Standardized Regression Slopes — coef.betasandwich
text: Returns vector standardized regression slopes.

title: Standardized Regression Slopes — coef.betasandwich
text: Ivan Jacob Agaloos Pesigan

title: Standardized Regression Slopes — coef.betasandwich
code: object <- lm(QUALITY ~ NARTIC + PCTGRT + PCTSUPP, data = nas1982) std <- BetaHC(object) coef(std) #>    NARTIC    PCTGRT   PCTSUPP  #> 0.4951451 0.3914887 0.2632477

what: Confidence Intervals for Standardized Regression Slopes — confint.betasandwich
title: Confidence Intervals for Standardized Regression Slopes — confint.betasandwich
text: Confidence Intervals Standardized Regression Slopes

title: Confidence Intervals for Standardized Regression Slopes — confint.betasandwich
code: # S3 method for betasandwich confint(object, parm = NULL, level = 0.95, ...)

title: Confidence Intervals for Standardized Regression Slopes — confint.betasandwich
text: object Object class betasandwich. parm specification parameters given confidence intervals, either vector numbers vector names. missing, parameters considered. level confidence level required. ... additional arguments.

title: Confidence Intervals for Standardized Regression Slopes — confint.betasandwich
text: Returns matrix confidence intervals.

title: Confidence Intervals for Standardized Regression Slopes — confint.betasandwich
text: Ivan Jacob Agaloos Pesigan

title: Confidence Intervals for Standardized Regression Slopes — confint.betasandwich
code: object <- lm(QUALITY ~ NARTIC + PCTGRT + PCTSUPP, data = nas1982) std <- BetaHC(object) confint(std, level = 0.95) #>               2.5%     97.5% #> NARTIC  0.33659828 0.6536920 #> PCTGRT  0.22631203 0.5566654 #> PCTSUPP 0.09068548 0.4358099

what: 1982 National Academy of Sciences Doctoral Programs Data — nas1982
title: 1982 National Academy of Sciences Doctoral Programs Data — nas1982
text: 1982 National Academy Sciences Doctoral Programs Data

title: 1982 National Academy of Sciences Doctoral Programs Data — nas1982
1982 National Academy of Sciences Doctoral Programs Data — nas1982
text: Ratings 46 doctoral programs psychology USA following variables: QUALITY Program quality ratings. NFACUL Number faculty members program. NGRADS Number program graduates. PCTSUPP Percentage program graduates received support. PCTGRT Percent faculty members holding research grants. NARTIC Number published articles attributed program faculty member. PCTPUB Percent faculty one published article.

title: 1982 National Academy of Sciences Doctoral Programs Data — nas1982
text: National Research Council. (1982). assessment research-doctorate programs United States: Social behavioral sciences. doi:10.17226/9781 . Reproduced permission National Academy Sciences, Courtesy National Academies Press, Washington, D.C.

text: object Object class betasandwich. ... additional arguments.

title: Sampling Covariance Matrix of the Standardized Regression Slopes — vcov.betasandwich
text: Returns matrix variance-covariance matrix standardized slopes.

title: Sampling Covariance Matrix of the Standardized Regression Slopes — vcov.betasandwich
text: Ivan Jacob Agaloos Pesigan

title: Sampling Covariance Matrix of the Standardized Regression Slopes — vcov.betasandwich
code: object <- lm(QUALITY ~ NARTIC + PCTGRT + PCTSUPP, data = nas1982) std <- BetaHC(object) vcov(std) #>               NARTIC       PCTGRT      PCTSUPP #> NARTIC   0.006172168 -0.003602529 -0.001943469 #> PCTGRT  -0.003602529  0.006699155 -0.002443584 #> PCTSUPP -0.001943469 -0.002443584  0.007311625
